text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki got hurt during training, so I take her
to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Guh! I'm fine... or so I'd like to say, but I'd be
lying... Argh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... That was pretty good acting, right? Did
you fall for it?
choice_data_list:
You pretending to be fine right now is the real
act.

You pretending to be fine right now is the real
act.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I turned my charm on up to eleven, and you still
saw through it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What should I do now, director? I shall submit to
your vision...
choice_data_list: Your stage is the track, not here.
Your stage is the track, not here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What should I do now, director? I shall submit to
your vision...
choice_data_list: Your stage is the track, not here.
Your stage is the track, not here.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes... I think I'll do... just that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But... I have to patrol my dorm tonight...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And I'm sure my sweet ponies have favors they
want to ask of me...
choice_data_list: You need to prioritize yourself right now!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Y-you have a point... I'll focus on my recovery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch over Fuji Kiseki to make sure she's able to
get enough rest.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You're right. This isn't where I should be devoting
my performance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best to return to my true
stage—the racing track!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's brainstorm a training regimen that won't
affect my injury.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Apologies... I can't focus because of the pain...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'll leave the rest of the planning to you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her pain is so distracting that she's unable to
concentrate on anything else...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can focus on conditioning the other parts of my
body that aren't injured first...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But I should do some visualization exercises
so I'll be prepared for full-body training once I
recover!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I have to do all I can to make sure I'm ready!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is able to heal faster than predicted
thanks to the new regimen we put together!
